name: IdsEdwPcaAdmDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE_BASE as (SELECT PCA_ADM.PCA_ADM_SK, PCA_ADM.PCA_ADM_ID, PCA_ADM.EFF_DT_SK, PCA_ADM.DEDCT_CMPNT_SK, PCA_ADM.TERM_DT_SK, PCA_ADM.ACCUM_SFX_ID, PCA_ADM.PCA_ALLOC_PFX_ID, PCA_ADM.PCA_ADM_DESC, DEDCT_CMPNT.DEDCT_CMPNT_ID, DEDCT_CMPNT.ACCUM_NO, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') as SRC_SYS_CD, PCA_ADM.PCA_COINS_ELIG_IN, PCA_ADM.PCA_COPAY_ELIG_IN, PCA_ADM.PCA_DEDCT_ELIG_IN, PCA_ADM.PCA_ACCUM_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PCA_ADM PCA_ADM INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DEDCT_CMPNT DEDCT_CMPNT ON PCA_ADM.DEDCT_CMPNT_SK = DEDCT_CMPNT.DEDCT_CMPNT_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON PCA_ADM.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE PCA_ADM.DEDCT_CMPNT_SK=DEDCT_CMPNT.DEDCT_CMPNT_SK) SELECT PCA_ADM_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END as SRC_SYS_CD, PCA_ADM_ID, EFF_DT_SK as PCA_ADM_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, DEDCT_CMPNT_SK, ACCUM_NO as DEDCT_CMPNT_ACCUM_NO, DEDCT_CMPNT_ID, PCA_ACCUM_NO, ACCUM_SFX_ID as PCA_ADM_ACCUM_SFX_ID, PCA_ALLOC_PFX_ID as PCA_ADM_ALLOC_PFX_ID, PCA_ADM_DESC, TERM_DT_SK as PCA_ADM_TERM_DT_SK, PCA_COINS_ELIG_IN, PCA_COPAY_ELIG_IN, PCA_DEDCT_ELIG_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} as LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM CTE_BASE
